name: Government Museum & Art Gallery
description: A Le Corbusier-designed museum housing an extraordinary collection of Gandhara sculptures, Pahari miniature paintings, and contemporary Indian art in a modernist setting.
history: Established in 1947 and designed by Le Corbusier. Houses one of the finest collections of Gandharan Buddhist art outside Afghanistan and Pakistan.
famousFor: Gandhara sculptures, Pahari paintings, and Le Corbusier architecture.
